scripts.cap:copy:ios: npx cap copy ios && rm -rf ios/App/App/public/yomichan-audio && rm -f ios/App/App/public/assets/dictionaries/JMdict_english.json ios/App/App/public/assets/dictionaries/*.zip
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npx cap sync ios && rm -rf ios/App/App/public/yomichan-audio && rm -f ios/App/App/public/assets/dictionaries/JMdict_english.json ios/App/App/public/assets/dictionaries/*.zip
scripts.cap:copy:android: npx cap copy android && rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/public/yomichan-audio && rm -f android/app/src/main/assets/public/assets/dictionaries/JMdict_english.json android/app/src/main/assets/public/assets/dictionaries/*.zip
scripts.cap:sync:android: npx cap sync android && rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/public/yomichan-audio && rm -f android/app/src/main/assets/public/assets/dictionaries/JMdict_english.json android/app/src/main/assets/public/assets/dictionaries/*.zip
